notes: Direct hourly sum of on-chain Curve TokenExchange event amounts. For 3pool: USDC-denominated. For crvUSD/USDT pool: USDT-denominated. Tier A in substance because it is a reproducible, timestamped, on-chain record.

Net USDC/USDT minted minus burned, summed to 1-hour windows from on-chain Transfer events to/from null address. Sparse: typically a handful of events per event window. Use event-arrival analysis, not continuous lead-lag, for robust inference.
Requires full L2 order-book (Tardis or Kaiko). Currently NULL for all CEX nodes (no vendor key set). Will remain Tier B until vendor data is sourced.

claim_language: order-book imbalance from full L2 depth
BBO spread proxy (Binance bookTicker or Coinbase candle)
notes: Computed from best-bid-offer only; does not reflect actual trading cost for any meaningful notional size. Tier B: public market context.

claim_language: mid-price proxy from public BBO or OHLCV
log-peg deviation (log mid_price or log implied_pool_price)
notes: Log deviation of price from 1.0 USD. Computed from either CEX mid-price (Tier B BBO) or pool implied price (Tier B derived). Valid for contextual co-movement; not execution-grade.
Cumulative stablecoin net-sold divided by a hardcoded pool-size normaliser. Approximate: true reserve ratio requires archive-RPC get_balances() at each block. Use as stress-direction indicator only.
Approximate implied price from reserve imbalance. Not an actual execution price; use as directional proxy only.
Pre-aggregated by CoinMetrics using heuristic exchange address labelling (~80% confidence). Use as directional context only.
